articles.title: Hurricanes Sweep Senators To Become First Team To Advance
articles.description: Logan Stankoven scored the go-ahead goal in the third period as the Carolina Hurricanes defeated Ottawa 4-2 to sweep the first-round series. Taylor Hall added a goal and an assist before Sebastian Aho buried two pucks into the empty net. Frederik Andersen made 25 saves. And Seth Jarvis chipped in two assists for the first NHL team to advance into Round 2.
